title: Tool Settings
subtitle: Tool execution configuration and available tool list

config.title: Execution Behavior
config.description: Control confirmation and timeout policies for tool calls.

config.autoExecuteDesc: Skip user confirmation before tool execution.
config.subagentMaxConcurrencyDesc: How many subagents may run in parallel at the same time.
config.confirmTimeoutDesc: Maximum time (seconds) to wait for user confirmation of tool calls.
config.executionTimeoutHint: Set 0 to disable execution timeout. Subagents and command execution tools manage their own execution limits and are not capped by this setting.

subagentBatchPolicy.label: Subagent Batch Scheduling
subagentBatchPolicy.desc: Choose how multiple subagent launches from the same model response are scheduled.
subagentBatchPolicy.safeOnlyDesc: Parallelize only subagent launches whose target is marked read-only.
subagentBatchPolicy.forceParallelDesc: Run multiple subagent launches from the same response in parallel, still respecting subagent capacity limits.
